svg.aria-label: ReWOO evidence-variable binding. A worksheet lists four steps: E1 searches the policy for the refund window, E2 searches products for who acquired Acme, E3 searches products for the bound earbuds warranty, and E4 calculates 18 percent of 250. The result of E2, that Acme was acquired by Globex, binds into E3 so the literal string hash E2 earbuds warranty becomes Globex earbuds warranty. One solver call then reads the filled worksheet and writes the answer.
svg.title: ReWOO: the planner names results as #E variables before they exist; tools fill them; one solver reads the worksheet
